text.title: graphql-api-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for graphql-api-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent adds a new Query/Mutation field without permission_classes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Silently exposes data or performs mutations without auth. SDD quality gate must enforce this with a CI check.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Under concurrent writes, offset pagination produces duplicates (inserted rows) and gaps (deleted rows). Cursor pagination is stable.
